5.reason: [This loop incorrectly includes both endpoints and assumes c[1] is '-', but does not validate that c[1] is '-' or that c[0] and c[2] are of the same valid type (e.g., both lowercase, uppercase, or digits). It also fails to handle cases where expansion should not occur (e.g., 'a-R'), violating problem requirements.]
